risk_title: ARTF Cancellation Due to Extraordinary Political Situation
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) financing for the project was canceled, and IDA grants remain suspended due to the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as High, indicating significant instability affecting the implementing agency (Independent Directorate for Local Governance) and project execution capacity.
evidence_quote: Risk Category Rating at Approval Previous Rating Current Rating Political and Governance High High High

risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation has worsened from Substantial at approval to Moderate currently, reflecting declining ability of implementing agencies to execute project activities under the current political context.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability Substantial Moderate Moderate

risk_summary: Fiduciary risk rating has worsened from Substantial at approval to Moderate currently, indicating increased concerns about financial management and accountability in the fragile governance environment.
Other risks have escalated from Substantial at approval to High currently, suggesting new or emerging implementation challenges beyond standard project risks in the Afghan context.
